summary:
LEADERSHIP EXAMINATION AND THE SHAKING OF THE CHURCH: Brandon shares that the Lord has been showing him a profound message over the past 48 hours concerning leadership within the body of Christ. God is currently examining His troops and leaders, demanding purity and removing compromise. Drawing parallels to the Israelites who missed the Promised Land due to fear and a grasshopper mentality, Brandon warns that a whole generation of current church leadership may pass away to make room for new, courageous voices. He emphasizes that just as the mighty Roman Empire eventually fell, modern powerful institutions will also face a divine shaking meant to awaken the global church, leading to the collapse of some established mega-ministries and the rise of new, fearless leaders.

GEOPOLITICAL THREATS AND AMERICAN DECLINE: Brandon warns of severe impending changes to the United States and the global order, including the birth of a new global digital currency. He describes a prophetic vision of a wounded eagle and a dove of peace having its heart ripped out by two black crows, symbolizing a Trojan horse-style invasion and an enemy operating from within American soil. Highlighting the fragility of current freedoms, Brandon references the sacrifices of soldiers on the beaches of Normandy and the founding fathers, warning that both the First and Second Amendments will face intense challenges, particularly around the year 2028. He expresses deep frustration with a passive culture and urges believers to adopt a radical, bulldog faith to protect their children from being indoctrinated by false religions, citing recent events in English schools as a dire warning for America.

RADICAL FAITH AND UPCOMING REVIVAL: Brandon calls for a departure from lukewarm, seeker-friendly Christianity, which he suggests might be influenced by deep state or Illuminati agendas designed to keep the masses passive. Instead, he prophesies the emergence of new young Davids and Esthers who possess a fearless mentality. Brandon emphasizes that the upcoming revival will not be born from superficial enthusiasm but through intense refining fire, suffering, and fervent prayer, much like the historic ministries of William Seymour and Smith Wigglesworth. He encourages believers to elevate their spiritual perspective, likening the required mindset to an eagle soaring above turbulence and hunting serpents, rather than remaining distracted on the ground.

GLOBAL EVENTS AND PROPHETIC VISIONS: Brandon recounts several global events and prophetic sights, including the burning of oil infrastructure on Kharg Island tied to Israeli strikes, drones being shot down, and oil prices threatening to surge to two hundred dollars a barrel. He notes alliances forming between China, India's Prime Minister Modi, and Russia over oil supplies. Additionally, Brandon mentions environmental and international anomalies, such as a meteor striking the erupting Mayon Volcano in the Philippines, the Rio Grande drying up and halting trafficking routes, and a massive explosion in Lebanon producing mushroom clouds. He also requests prayers for Donald Trump's health following his checkup at Walter Reed and for his continued protection against threats.

END TIMES TIMELINES AND THE HARBINGERS: Brandon details a complex prophetic timeline heavily tied to the Jewish calendar, specifically mentioning Moedim, Rosh Hashanah, and the Shemitah cycles. He repeatedly references Jonathan Cahn, The Harbinger, and a vision of a new book potentially titled The Mysteries, predicting significant events surrounding the anniversary of September 11 and the emergence of a new Ground Zero. Brandon discusses a critical two-year window between 2026 and 2028, signaling the end of a dispensation of grace and the beginning of an unprecedented global harvest and wealth transfer. He sees visions of golden foundations, massive John Deere combines representing spiritual and financial harvesting, and an hourglass running out of sand, urging believers to stay in perfect sync with God's timing.

PRAYER INTERCESSION AND SALVATION CALL: Brandon concludes the broadcast with a fervent prayer for the nation, political leaders, and a sweeping revival stretching from coast to coast and reaching nations like Cuba and Venezuela. He specifically prays for the Church of His Presence led by John Kilpatrick and for movements in Missouri, Minnesota, and New York.
rawData: [May 27, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/G7T_Ugj_wn4]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again today. We're going to go over some of the things the Lord showed us in this last video three days ago. I've taken some time to pray over what the Lord has been showing me. Some of the things, like I always talk to you all about, is knowing your audience. Now, what the Lord has been showing me the last 48 hours really strong is concerning the leadership in the church. Everybody's a leader in the body of Christ. You're leading somebody. There's always somebody watching. But whenever God puts his hand on you to lead as a pastor, teacher, evangelist, or prophetic voice, too much is given, much is required. As I was praying, the word has been very heavy to the point where I didn't want to come across making a video last night as fear. I want to be precise in how I'm saying things so that you can take it to God in prayer. Everything I say is my opinion of what the Holy Spirit is showing me and what I feel the Lord is leading me in prayer to. Right now, he's examining his troops. He told me, 'I'm examining my leadership. I'm examining the troops.' He started talking to me about how all the children of Israel, because there was doubt and unbelief in them, that generation didn't get to go on and experience the promise because they said, 'We're the size of grasshoppers.' They didn't go and inherit the land because they were afraid. They didn't do what God had called them to do. So, a whole generation had to pass away, other than just a handful, to go and take the promised land, Canaan—the beautiful milk and honey—but the giants were in the land, right? As I was praying, he was relaying that there's a lot of elders and people that are in ministry right now where there's going to be a real reshaping of the body of Christ. He's talking about the body of Christ as a whole. A lot of times, as charismatics, we think because we're baptized in the Holy Ghost and we walk with the giftings, he's really talking about us, but he's talking about everybody. He said, 'I'm shaking the church to awaken the church.' The church isn't just charismatics; the church is the body of Christ—everybody. He started talking to me about Rome back 1,500 or 2,000 years ago, back when Jesus was on the earth. If you were to tell them then that Rome would cease to exist in the way they were, they would have laughed at you. Nobody is more powerful than Rome. Their army, their bridges, their roads, their infrastructure is superb. But that Rome and that power doesn't exist anymore. There's a changing of the tide and a changing of things coming. There's a shaking to awaken. There's a new financial system that's about to be rebirthed, a new global digital currency. The United States of America, over the last 100 years plus, has been the top dog in the schoolyard. You look at the United States and they're the supreme military, the best of everything. But for the first time ever, I saw military things taking place on our own home soil. Not a civil war per se, but an actual invasion like a Trojan horse. I keep seeing this 'enemy within,' and I saw a wounded eagle. I saw this wounded eagle, this wounded bird; the dove that was laying had trusted in that. I saw the dove with two black crows and a beautiful cardinal that took the dove's heart. I saw a dove of peace dead on the ground, and I saw the heart that was ripped out of the dove by the two black crows. The Lord has been talking to me about the church and the shaking of this nation. As he said, 'the eyes of the Lord run to and fro.' He brought up the scripture 2 Chronicles 16:9. 'For the eyes of the Lord run to and fro throughout the whole earth to show himself strong on behalf of those whose heart is loyal to him. In this you may have done foolishly; therefore, from now on you shall have wars.' As I was looking, he was examining his troops, his bride, and his leadership. He started talking to me about the shaking to awaken. From Psalm 17:8: 'Keep me as the apple of thy eye; hide me under the shadow of thy wings.' As he's examining you, he's examining the hearts. There was so much compromise and mixture in the hearts over the body of Christ, and he was calling for a pure bride to come to his side, calling forth the church to wake up out of this slumber. Psalm 17:8: 'Keep me as the apple of thy eye; hide me under the shadow of thy wings.' That's where we all should be, examining our hearts that we are the apple of his eye. 2 Chronicles 16:9: 'The eye of the Lord is running to and fro looking at the hearts.' This was my heart's cry as I was praying this out and travailing in the spirit. I come to Psalm 17:8. As his eyes were gazing upon us, what does he see in you and me as leaders, like you're blowing the horn on the wall warning of the second coming of Jesus? We're all looking for the rapture. We're about to experience the greatest outpouring and move of the Spirit of the Lord we've ever seen, and many people don't believe. Can we take the land for Jesus in Cuba, Venezuela, Brazil, Thailand, South Korea, or North Korea? As I told you, there were highways in the spirit realm that we would translate. You'll be preaching in one area and then all of a sudden be translated to another area, and God will have us minister to a group of people. But taking that doubt and unbelief of the old generation because they've never seen it before—he said, 'I'm examining my troops, and there'll be some of them that will not make it to what I've called them to in this next promised land, to this revival.' I'm done with the tongue that is against—if you're not for him, you're against him. If you're not going to start saying out your mouth, we're going to have the greatest revival this world has ever seen. And I saw new young Davids; I saw new young Esthers. And he started saying, 'I heard it so loud: "If I perish, I perish. If I perish, I perish."' When Mordecai said to Esther, 'Haven't you been called to the kingdom for such a time as this? Haven't you been called to the kingdom for such a time as this?' And he said, 'I'm examining the hearts. Is there fear in it to what I've asked you to do? Who is on the Lord's side?' I know it’s about knowing my audience, and that's why I was praying over there. I said, 'Who is on the Lord's side?' because the babies don't get it, but you veterans understand what I'm talking about. And I saw a cleansing coming of older, huge ministries—mega-ministries that have TV programs, staffs of many people, and a transition. And he said, 'Some of these will not even exist in the months ahead. For some of these, their time has come; their season is over.' And you will see one that was be no more, and one that wasn't be. And I saw a rising up of new faces that will come out of nowhere. And I saw them taking the land. I saw a bulldog faith coming on people that just say, 'If I perish, I perish.' They're not worried about themselves. They're not worried about the finances. They're not worried about what people think. He said, 'I'll raise up people to fund this with creative ideas to get wealth, to fund this end-time move.' And the Lord said, 'Brandon, there's not enough preparation in the heart. There's not enough going higher.' I saw so many eagles that were plucking with the chickens, and I was one of them. He was correcting me. He said, 'You think too much about what other people think. If you want to be a mouthpiece in this next wave, you've got to fly above all this Christian turbulence and be set apart. There's no compromise in this—no worrying about what sister clipboard thinks. Who cares what sister clipboard thinks or brother busybody? Just fly like an eagle. An eagle doesn't care about what those other chickens are doing; he's looking at them as prey. I mean, that's what an eagle usually does. But it's time to come up higher. I'm not saying we're eating our own; that's probably a bad illustration. But he's looking for snakes. An eagle is looking for the serpent. An eagle's looking for the rattlesnake, the cobra, or whatever he can do to pluck its head and eat it. That's a better illustration. You like that one? That's better. I like that. The eagle's looking for his lunch, but he's not down on the bottom plucking away like a chicken. The chicken doesn't know what's coming. An eagle does because he's up high enough to see what's coming. And as we are praying over this nation, just as Rome fell, America will be humbled. America will be humbled and shaken to awaken. We have a window of opportunity. We're praying for our president in this opportunity. As he said, 'Don't be an ostrich that sticks its head in the sand.' We become so complacent with time. Yesterday's news—we can hear about something major that happened, like a Charlie Kirk thing or whatever, and something huge happens back last year—but a lot of people go back to their Monday through Friday. They've got their nose to the grindstone, and they're going with all their heart just trying to make it and barely getting by. You get distracted with the water that's getting hotter and hotter all around you. And that's what he was talking to me about. I saw something that didn't make my flesh happy. And he's looking for the people that will say, 'If I perish, I perish. I'm sold out.' It's easy to be a parrot. I was listening to a sermon—I won't say which one—and it was really good. It blessed me. Everything the individual was saying was about fire, talking about the glory, but afterward they said, 'We're going to lay hands on people at the end of the service and we're going to experience this, right?' And it was like touching a cold stove. I watched as there was no manifestation of what the individual preached. They were so excited and enthusiastic, and the sermon tried to stir everybody up. It was one of those where you go, but there was no demonstration after the sermon was over. As I watched, the Lord said, 'I want you to see something.' He said, 'This comes out of refiner's fire. This level of glory—find the scripture—for the greater glory comes by the refining. It comes by the refining, and the greater the suffering, the greater the glory and the manifestation of the glory.' And he said it's on individuals like it was William Seymour, like it was Smith Wigglesworth. I asked why it was on these men, and it was the refining fire—'If I perish, I perish.' Like Esther, like what she said, there's a key to it. We can parrot a lot of things and we can say some things that some other elders say because it sounds good. We can stir up the crowd, and people start hooting and hollering. But there's a level of the glory, a level of the manifested presence of God that I'm after. I was listening to the parrot of the sermon. You walk away and they're saying, 'Oh, we're going to have fire in here afterward and the glory of God's going to show.' And it was like touching a cold stove. You walk away and you go, 'Was that it?' That sermon lasted for over an hour and a half, and that was the glory? Does that make sense? From suffering to glory. For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which shall be revealed in us, Romans 8. For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which shall be revealed in us. It comes with the glory. The greater outpouring comes with pressure. He's not going to share His glory with anyone. But I saw as you go vertical, you attract to deflect. You attract to deflect as you're that mirror, and you're always shining it up to Him. It's the reflection of the mirror. As people are looking at you, you always point them to the Father. It's the level of what I saw coming, that He's raising up new voices and new faces in what's about to happen. But the church that we've always known is going to change in a major way in the days ahead. You'll pinch yourself and even look back and say, 'I remember when,' for how we've done church in the past will be no more. We're going to do something new that's never been done before. It will be fueled by fire. It will be fueled by prayer. Ignited by His Spirit. No. What did Brother Hagin say? 'Ignited with His glory.' Yeah, Ignited with His glory. Filled by fire. Tell me what it is in the comments section. But what the Lord was showing me was it's going to be fueled by prayer. And the Lord was showing me about the igniting and the last outpouring will be something that we've never seen before—where it's coming from and us being bold. Are we the size of grasshoppers in these giants' eyes? Can Cuba be saved? Can Venezuela be saved? Can we see LA be saved? Can we see Portland, Oregon have a major revival? Can we see Chicago—in the hood and the ghetto of Chicago—have a move of God? Can Chicago be touched with the fire of the Holy Ghost, with the Bloods and the Crips and the gang members? Can we see the greatest move of God in Brooklyn, in the worst parts of New York? Is it Harlem? What is it? I don't know. Skid Row. Can God come in and shake Skid Row? Oh no, we're the size of grasshoppers. That's when he said, 'I'm it.' He's killing that in people as he's examining us and he was showing me it's time for us to wake up. And that's what he's been dealing with me about. It was heavy. And as I was in deep prayer over this, he started to say, 'Brandon, I have to do something different because I'm out of time. And I'm raising up people that are on fire for me, that are just sold out, that say, "If I perish, I perish."' You're not afraid of death. You're not afraid of that. Because I was looking at it, I said, 'Lord, we see people dying. We see this happening.' I watched Private Ryan for Memorial Day and it's a very bloody movie. I'd never seen it before, but I was doing it. It was on my heart. And you say, 'Well, Brandon, you think God told you to watch Private Ryan?' It's about honoring the troops that fell on the beaches of Normandy. As I saw them take that beach and the Germans were beating them down with those bullets and they were just shredding their bodies with stuff, and I watched them men fight as they were going up that hill to get that, I thought, 'My God, what did they fight for?' They fought for us to have freedom to be able to do what we're doing right now. They fought for us to have freedom for religion, to be able to have our Bill of Rights to do the things that we need right now for revival that's about to happen. And I'm telling you, ladies and gentlemen, it takes... people are so limp-wristed. You're so metrosexual. Skinny jeans and fog machines, and you can't tell if you're homosexual, if you're really a male. Do you have what it takes to be that bulldog on a bone? Or are you just going to be limp-wristed, sir? You're going to have to have some testosterone up in here. And we're going to have to be like the mighty men of war with David. And there's so many people that have no... well, you know, I'm just like, 'Get out of my way.' I'll never be friends. Don't ever try to talk to me. Either you got it or you don't. Either you want to fight for what God has given us or we're going to lose it. Let me give you an example of why I'm as radical inside tonight than I've ever been before. I want to read this. Move over, baby. I can't see it. Fueled by prayer. Fired by the spirit. Ignited with the glory. Fueled by prayer. Fired by the spirit. Ignited with his glory. Now you want to know why I'm passionate tonight. And you say, 'Well, what do you mean by being limp-wristed?' I'm talking about people who are just passively getting by and you have no testosterone. You're a weak, wimpy man. That's what I'm talking about. This is the trash I'm talking about. I want to show you what happened in England today. And this is coming to America. This is coming to America if you don't wake up. I'm telling you, this is the trash they're going to push on our kids in the coming days. In England, they're taking them... here, play. So public school systems do this now, huh? So you want to let your kids learn how to be Islam? Limp-wristed men let that happen. Good for him. Do you see it? That's what I'm talking about. They're going to push it down your throat and you're either going to swallow it or you're going to spew it all over them. You're not going to ever cause my kids to bow down to a false god. The only person who ever died for you was Jesus Christ. And there's no other way to the Father except through him. Muhammad didn't save you. Buddha didn't save you. The devil can't help you. There's no other religion other than the Lord Jesus Christ. There's no other way to the Father other than him. Good for that young man for saying, 'I ain't bowing to your false god.' But this is what I'm trying to tell you. As the church is so passive, people get upset when I talk about having firearms. I got firearms all around me all the time. I carry a gun on me. I carry a gun in my car. I got more clips than I've got toothpaste in my house. I'm telling you, people get mad at me. Get mad. Go away. I don't care. I don't want you here. But I'm going to tell you, if you don't get radical for Jesus... you say, 'Well, what does that have to do?' Because our founding fathers... well, the ones that died on the beach of Normandy, and George Washington that suffered, and their troops all fought for your freedom. Every single one of them died on that battlefield. But they didn't do it with an ink pen. They didn't do it, sister, with a little clipboard. They did it with a musket. Some of them with not very good rifles from what I was watching. But it took some guts to take the land and say, 'No, you're not going to kill all these Jews. No, we're not all going to be speaking German.' And now there's a lot of God-fearing Germans that watch me, but Hitler was a tyrant. And the same kind of Antichrist spirit is coming again. And as long as we are here, we will occupy and take the land for Jesus. And we pray and we intercede. But there's going to have to be some of that bulldog faith that says, 'No, not in my house. You're not doing this.' As you see these little kids bowing down to Muhammad, the false gods in schools, and you go, 'What is going on? Is that normal?' No, that's not normal. It bothers me a lot. And maybe you're watching the wrong channel because I'm not going to sit idly by and watch schools here. I'm going to pray. I'm going to do what we got to do. You say, 'Well, Brandon, what do you think we should do?' We got to speak out at our school boards. I'm not talking about people getting violent, but I'm talking about whenever it comes down to our war and what's going on right now. We're fighting an enemy that has more of a backbone saying, 'Listen, we're going to fight America.' They're still crying out 'Death to America' all across Iran right now. I saw the videos and I'm like, we're trying to liberate you. We're trying to help you, and these crazy people are in the streets yelling 'Death to America' still, and I'm like, what in the world's going on with them? We're trying to take out your government to help you have a freedom to get away and they're still in the streets yelling 'Death to America.' And I'm thinking, my God, I thought, 'That's a difference in culture, huh?' Something ain't right. So, we pray for the people. We pray for our troops. As I watched Saving Private Ryan, like I saw that movie was so real to me. It shook me. I'd never seen it before. And I went, 'Oh my gosh, this is a lot. This is over the top what those men went through. Thank God for their service.' But they didn't do that and die on that beach with blood everywhere and guts and everything for you to lose your freedom. Our Bill of Rights. I told you what will be challenged. The First Amendment will be challenged greatly in 2028. Your First Amendment rights will be challenged greatly. And I saw a web that was wrapped around by a spider all the way across it. And the spider had built a web all around the First Amendment. And it was trying to come after the Second Amendment. And it had a black line and it couldn't get through it. Remember that? And I said it was trying to wrap the Second Amendment. I don't know. I just want to say I'm cut from a different thing than a lot of y'all. There's some of you that think like me and know that it's time to get radical for Jesus and preach the second coming of the Lord. And it's time to wake up. Jesus Christ is coming. And we have so many people that are just so brainwashed. There are a lot of you who are brainwashed. I walk away and I have to be quiet for three days because I get so frustrated with it. I just have to take a break and listen to Him being quiet because I hear Him and He is not screaming. He's a still, small voice. If you want to know what He's saying, you have to get quiet in the flower bed. You have to get quiet in your place pulling weeds. Keep cleaning toilets. Whatever you have to do, He'll talk to you, but He's not in all of the clutter. It's interesting because I watch; there is so much—He's so reserved. He's so self-controlled. He is the fruit of the spirit. Everything about the Holy Spirit is the fruit of the spirit: love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, and self-control. He's not like a church social where everybody is talking. He's reserved and He's poised, and everything about Him is amazing. Every single time He talks to me, it's always correction and leading me. He's always about being a leader and a backbone. Many of you don't know Him. You think you do, but you don't. Even with a glimpse of what I have, He is awesome. Every single time He talks, He's not in the clutter. He takes you to get quiet in the flower bed. As you see, I have dirt all under my nails; I pull weeds. He talks in the fellowship, in the communion of that still, small voice. Then it gets loud. He talked to me about Modi today, the man who is over India. I could see the plans. I could see the oil fields burning. I could see the petrodollar. I could see so much. As that cloak came on me so strong while I was worshipping and singing, the glory came on me. I went into a Home Depot and saw a man. I could hear in the spirit—the two people standing together as I was underneath that glory—I could see that he was going to rip him off in business. I didn't say anything, but when that glory is on me, I am able to see about business and stuff. The Lord talks to me about money and business, and He'll say, 'This right here is not good. That guy is going to rip him off, Brandon.' I said, 'Well, what am I supposed to do about that?' It's talking. It's fellowship. It's getting out of all the YouTube clutter. There's so much clutter. He is that still, small voice. There is so much church drama. I guess that's why I'm like the one called in the wilderness, and I'm on the backside of the desert a lot. I love being by myself with just my kids and my wife. I couldn't care less; I could go away and never talk to any of you again. You know what I'm saying? That's why I feel like I go on the backside, but the Lord said, 'I called you and I need your help.' I want you all just to get it: we have what it takes to win the nations for Jesus. We are not the size of grasshoppers; we are the giants in the land. The devil is running from us; we're not running from him. We will take the land for Jesus with Holy Ghost and fire. But sometimes it requires war. Ask our brothers who went to Vietnam. Ask the Pearl Harbor victims. Ask Desert Storm. Ask our troops in Afghanistan when we abandoned our post because of Sleepy Joe Biden and left all our military equipment over there. Ask these idiots who are running our country, some of them in the last administration. Then we have what's going on in Britain right now. It's all being set up for the end times. I understand it. But we must arise and shine, for the light has come and the glory of the Lord is risen on us. You have to learn how to protect your family, too. Say, 'Listen, my kid is not going to school that day. We're not doing that.' Like that young man right there standing down: 'I'm not bowing to your God.' I'd like to shake his hand and say, 'Good for you, buddy.' All the sheep. Next clip. Yeah, Kharg Island. Yeah, I see it burning. I've been praying over this. A major attack is coming and wiping out the infrastructure of this oil all over this island. It's according to NASA FIRMS data. They're saying there are fires reported. I saw attacks all over this, and it was not America; it was Israel. I saw oil trying to go to $200 a barrel. There was great anti-Semitism that rose up all across the land because of this. China and Modi in India were all going to Russia trying to figure out how they could get their oil supply and things that are about to happen. I saw this island completely engulfed in flames. It's happening a little bit, not to the extreme that I saw it, but they shot down drones in the strait. They're shooting down the boats and all this. So we see what's happening with that island now. A meteor strike into Mayon Volcano in the Philippines at the Mayon. Did I say that right? Yeah, the Mayon Volcano in the Philippines, as the volcano was erupting. Signs in the heavens, signs in the earth. What are the odds? That's pretty cool. Braden showed me that. I thought, 'Wow, that's pretty sweet.' Signs in heaven, signs in the earth. Next. The Rio Grande is drying up. There is no rain, no water. There are parts of the Rio Grande you're able to drive across. No water in the Rio Grande for the traffickers. Now they're still talking about Ivanka. Trump said he went to the doctor today. Trump has finished his annual medical and dental checkup at Walter Reed and is heading back to the White House soon. We just pray for his veins, his heart, and his body, that he lives long and finishes strong. Then we had the shooting, and this lady—they've gotten memes all over the internet from this lady diving down. The other lady is like, 'What is it?' She didn't know what was going on. They're shooting all behind her. We have our President; we have to pray for his life and protection. And then there are mushroom clouds. There is a major explosion in Lebanon. I wonder what that's about. It's a pretty big deal. All the things that are happening right now are pretty crazy. So, other than that, it was a pretty slow news day. Is there anything else you've done? Yeah, I'm done. Well, thank you, B. You did a good job. Everybody say, 'Yay, Braden.' I know I probably come across sometimes as a jerk, but I don't know how else to say it other than I see what the Lord shows me: a new Rome, a new shaking, and all these things. The only way now to say it is to come across as blunt and as bold as I can. Because now, the ones who have ears to hear will hear, and the ones who don't—you are in trouble. I'll be real with you. If you don't have ears to hear what the Spirit of the Lord is saying, and He's not speaking to you, and you're not preparing yourself in this Bible and reading it until it becomes a foundation in your life, it's a scary time for the world. We're going to see things accelerate on a level that we've never seen before, going from now until September. It may come across like, 'Brandon, why are you saying all this stuff?' It's because I'm trying to rattle the cages of the people who are asleep—whatever it takes to get you to wake up out of your slumber. Say, "Listen, we've got to take the land for Jesus. The greatest revival that we've ever seen before is standing right in front of us. The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. And I was just watching those sermons and I'm like, what does it take? The William Seymours, the R.W. Schambach, the Oral Roberts, the Jack Coe, the amazing people that walked back in the 50s, 60s, or 40s—I don't know—and they saw great mighty signs and wonders. And we've got to be that generation now that takes the baton and says, 'As for me and my house, we will serve the Lord and we will be victorious in what God has set us out to do. And if I perish, I perish.' You're going to take communion with me and pray for a little bit.
